history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach it, I plan to move forward to (2,C), then to (2,D), then turn clockwise to face down, then move down to (3,D) and then to (4,D). The immediate next step is to move forward to the empty cell (2,C).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row02 columnC facing right. The cell directly in front (row02 columnD) is empty ('.'), so I can safely move forward. Moving right will bring me closer to the goal, and avoids the lava below. After moving, I will need to turn to face down to proceed further.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D directly below. To move downward, I need to rotate clockwise to face down, then move forward twice.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing down. The goal is directly below at row 04, column D. The cell in front of me (row 03, column D) is a floor cell, so I can safely move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The goal cell is directly below me at row 04 column D. Moving forward will take me to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
